sentences.target: Tu peux baisser le volume s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø bɛse lə vɔlym sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux baisser le volume s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø bɛse lə vɔlym sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you turn the volume down, please.
translations.es: Puedes bajar el volumen, por favor.
translations.de: Kannst du bitte die Lautstärke runterdrehen.
translations.it: Puoi abbassare il volume, per favore.
translations.yue: 可唔可以將音量調細啲呀，唔該。
translations.pt: Você pode abaixar o volume, por favor.
translations.he: אתה יכול להנמיך את הווליום בבקשה.
translations.vi: Làm ơn vặn nhỏ âm lượng.
translations.ar: هل يمكنك خفض الصوت من فضلك.
translations.nl: Kun je het volume zachter zetten, alsjeblieft.
translations.hu: Le tudnád halkítani a hangot, kérlek.
translations.hi: कृपया वॉल्यूम थोड़ा कम कर दो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να χαμηλώσεις την ένταση, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Kan du skru ned lyden, vær så snill.
translations.ro: Poți să dai volumul mai încet, te rog.
translations.da: Kan du skrue ned for lyden, tak.
translations.ja: 音量を少し下げてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; addresses the addressee as subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 2nd-person singular present; expresses ability/permission and selects an infinitive complement (baisser).
Infinitive main verb; complements the modal 'peux' and takes a direct object ('le volume').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'volume'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'baisser'.
Contraction of 'si' (if) + 'il' (he/it); here part of the fixed polite formula 's'il te plaît' (‘please’).
2nd-person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object); within the idiom 's'il te plaît' refers to the addressee.
3rd-person singular present of 'plaire'; in the set phrase 's'il te plaît' functions as a politeness marker.

translations.en: I'm turning the music down now.
translations.es: Voy a bajar la música ahora.
translations.de: Ich drehe die Musik jetzt leiser.
translations.vi: Bây giờ tôi vặn nhỏ tiếng nhạc.
translations.nl: Ik zet de muziek nu zachter.
translations.hi: मैं अभी संगीत की आवाज़ कम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.da: Jeg skruer ned for musikken nu.
translations.ja: 今、音楽の音量を下げます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; marks the speaker as subject.
Present indicative, 1st-person singular; transitive verb taking 'la musique' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'musique'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'baisse'.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the action.

sentences.target: Il baisse les lumières pour le film.
sentences.reading: /il bɛs le lymjɛʁ puʁ lə film/

translations.fr: Il baisse les lumières pour le film.
translations.ipa: /il bɛs le lymjɛʁ puʁ lə film/
translations.en: He dims the lights for the movie.
translations.es: Él baja las luces para la película.
translations.de: Er dimmt das Licht für den Film.
translations.it: Lui abbassa le luci per il film.
translations.ko: 그는 영화 보려고 조명을 어둡게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他为看电影把灯光调暗。
translations.pt: Ele diminui as luzes para o filme.
translations.vi: Anh ấy hạ đèn để xem phim.
translations.nl: Hij dimt de lichten voor de film.
translations.hu: Lejjebb veszi a fényerőt a filmhez.
translations.hi: वह फ़िल्म के लिए लाइटें मंद कर रहा है.
translations.el: Χαμηλώνει τα φώτα για την ταινία.
translations.ja: 彼は映画のために照明を暗くします。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 3rd-person singular; transitive verb taking 'les lumières' as direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'lumières'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'baisse'.
Preposition; introduces a purpose complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'pour' indicating the purpose ('for the film').

sentences.target: Faut baisser le prix de ces pommes.
sentences.reading: /fo bɛse lə pʁi də se pɔm/

translations.fr: Faut baisser le prix de ces pommes.
translations.ipa: /fo bɛse lə pʁi də se pɔm/
translations.en: We need to lower the price of these apples.
translations.es: Hay que bajar el precio de estas manzanas.
translations.de: Wir müssen den Preis für diese Äpfel senken.
translations.it: Dobbiamo abbassare il prezzo di queste mele.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得把这些苹果的价格降下来。
translations.yue: 呢啲蘋果嘅價錢要減低。
translations.ru: Нам нужно снизить цену на эти яблоки.
translations.pt: Precisamos baixar o preço destas maçãs.
translations.he: צריך להוריד את המחיר של התפוחים האלה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần hạ giá những quả táo này.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى خفض سعر هذه التفاحات.
translations.nl: We moeten de prijs van deze appels verlagen.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно знизити ціну на ці яблука.
translations.hu: Le kell csökkentenünk ezeknek az almáknak az árát.
translations.hi: हमें इन सेबों की कीमत कम करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να μειώσουμε την τιμή αυτών των μήλων.
translations.nb: Vi må sette ned prisen på disse eplene.
translations.id: Kita perlu menurunkan harga apel ini.
translations.sv: Vi behöver sänka priset på de här äpplena.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scădem prețul acestor mere.
translations.da: Vi skal sænke prisen på disse æbler.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy laskea näiden omenoiden hintaa.
translations.ja: このリンゴの値段を下げる必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal verb, 3rd-person singular present; modal meaning 'it is necessary to', governing an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'faut'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'prix'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'baisser'.
Preposition; introduces a nominal complement specifying 'of what' price.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'pommes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of the preposition 'de'.
